pericopes.pericopeTitle: REDEMPTION OF VOTIVE OFFERINGSOFFERINGS NOT TO BE REDEEMED

entries.author: Pope St. Gregory I
entries.title: THE OLD LAW AND THE NEW.
entries.body: What is said by the law is less exacting than what is commanded by the Lord. The law prescribed the giving of a tithe, but our Redeemer ordered those who would follow the way of perfection to give up everything.{fn:0} {fn:1}
